knowledgeEntries.description: Course Timeline HTML file has content embedded via iframe pointing to 'Course Timeline (Thursday - 052).html' in a subfolder. Worker discovered this by grep searching for 'iframe' patterns. Future workers parsing Course Timeline need to account for this iframe structure.
